title: Fastify v5 over v4 for apps/storage
rationale: Fastify v4 EOL June 2025. v5.8.x pinned in apps/storage. Phases 5 and 6 inherit silently — risk if a task manually reinstalls with wrong version. Add Fastify version assertion to Phase 5/6 pre-work checklists.

description: COOP/COEP headers required for SharedArrayBuffer break cross-origin tile CDNs (Cloudflare R2, tile.openfreemap.org). Tiles fail to load when isolation headers set.
resolution: Use postMessage at 30Hz for cross-thread coord sync. Avoids SharedArrayBuffer and COOP/COEP requirement entirely.
